testcase.name: Role CRUD flow › create role, grant dangerous permissions, edit name, verify in list
Assign user to role via Members tab › search for user in command picker → member appears → avatar visible
Live permission update (Socket.IO push / reload fallback) › admin grants SALES view; user sees Sales sidebar link within 3 s (socket) or after reload (fallback)
Sidebar filter for Member-role user › Settings section hidden; Add Product button absent; /settings/roles shows no-access UI
Self-service password change › wrong current password → inline error; short new password → validation error; mismatch confirm → validation error; success → toast, re-login
